intake.user_request: Scope STUB-RAG-INDEX-ANALYZER-SLICE-COVERAGE-001 (the 47-file analyzer-slice coverage gap surfaced during DISPATCH-037 post-fix dynamic re-verification, after WO-INDEXING-ORCHESTRATOR-PATH-NORMALIZATION-001 closed AC-02 DIVERGED) into a CORE-side follow-up WO. The stub explicitly defers Option 1 vs Option 2 selection to ORCHESTRATOR before plan.json is authored.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Option 1 ruling locked 2026-05-05T15:55Z. Plan structures investigation (T1 globs / T2 analyzer-internal / T3 ChunkConverter) before fix to avoid preemptively touching all three surfaces. Investigation phase is committed before any src/ changes.
classification.discovery: Three investigation targets enumerated in analysis.json investigation_targets block. Probe scripts inherited from predecessor archive (diff-skipped.mjs, probe-analyzer.mjs).

scope.in_scope: TBD post-ruling. Both options share: AC reaching ±10% AC-09 dynamic alignment; no Phase 7 archive reopen; no IndexingResult schema delta; no new SkipReason values.
out_of_scope: Phase 7 archive of WO-PIPELINE-INDEXING-RAG-001 — locked, must NOT be reopened
Predecessor WO-INDEXING-ORCHESTRATOR-PATH-NORMALIZATION-001 archive — closed AC-02 DIVERGED, must NOT be reopened

scope_decision_required.decision: Option 1 vs Option 2 (see stub Section 'Two scope options for the follow-up WO')

option_1_expand_coverage.summary: Adjust rag-index analyzerService.analyze(...) and/or ChunkConverter filter chain so every file in .coderef/graph.json with element-grain metadata produces at least one chunk.
option_1_expand_coverage.pro: Restores ±10% AC-09 alignment without bending metric. Future RAG covers type-only modules + __tests__/ files.
option_1_expand_coverage.con: +47 files × N elements/file. Embedding cost rises. Index size rises. Some test files may add noise.
option_1_expand_coverage.risk: Latent ChunkConverter bugs may surface when expanded coverage hits previously-untested chunk shapes.

option_2_change_metric_basis.summary: Redefine AC-09 alignment so chunksSkipped(header_status_missing) is compared to count of missing-header files that ALSO appear in rag-index's analyzer graph (NOT to validation-report.header_missing_count).
option_2_change_metric_basis.pro: Honest within-rag-index consistency check. Zero src/ change inside rag-index/ChunkConverter.
option_2_change_metric_basis.con: Splits header_missing_count into 'populate-coderef view' and 'rag-index view' — two canonical numbers future agents must reconcile.
option_2_change_metric_basis.risk: Weakens 'measure against shipped validation-report.json' contract that ORCHESTRATOR has consistently invoked.

constraints: Phase 7 archive MUST NOT be reopened (rebuild is COMPLETE per DISPATCH-035, 2026-05-05T01:50Z)
No new field on IndexingResult schema (DR-PHASE-7-B locked additive)
No new SkipReason values (existing header_status_missing fires correctly)
Predecessor WO-INDEXING-ORCHESTRATOR-PATH-NORMALIZATION-001 stays CLOSED with AC-02 DIVERGED — its archive must NOT be reopened
Cultural validator scope-mode + tracking validator scope-mode must PASS clean

evidence_summary.ac_09_observed: 215 chunks correctly skipped of 262 missing-header files (gap = 47, gap_pct = 17.9%)
evidence_summary.structural_root_cause: populate-coderef writes graph.json from full Phase 1 + 2.5 + 5 element-grain scan (360 files seen, 262 with headerStatus=missing). rag-index invokes analyzerService.analyze(['./**/*.ts','./**/*.tsx','./**/*.js','./**/*.jsx','./**/*.py'], false) producing 2009 nodes covering ~215 of those 262 files. The 47-file shortfall consists primarily of type-only modules (no functions/classes for analyzer's element extractor to anchor on) and __tests__/ files (likely filtered by analyzer settings).
evidence_summary.static_check_passes: node check on .coderef/graph.json directly returns 262 — Phase 1 + 2.5 + 5 + 6 (validation-report) are internally consistent. Mismatch is in rag-index → ChunkConverter coverage shrink.

pending_artifacts.analysis_json: Deferred — authored by ORCHESTRATOR after Option 1 vs Option 2 ruling
pending_artifacts.plan_json: Deferred — authored by ORCHESTRATOR after Option 1 vs Option 2 ruling
